name: Market Technology Acquisition Corp
business: Market Technology Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses, focusing on the acquisition and scaling of U.S. equities and options clearing infrastructure. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target. The company intends to target businesses in the global capital markets ecosystem, particularly licensed clearing businesses and related market infrastructure.

exposures.sentence: We will focus our initial efforts on the acquisition, recapitalization and scaling of U.S. equities and options clearing infrastructure.
